name: XS Donchian channel-position long-short — canonical forward watch
role: KILL-detection / extension watch (26-week window cannot reach DSR>=0.95 unless observed ann Sharpe ~2.34; see power table)

signal.validity: all 120 closes > 0 AND (max_120 - min_120) > 1e-12, else cp undefined
signal.note: long high channel position (breakout); LOW direction was the study placebo and is excluded

weights.construction: z_i = (cp_i - mean_cs(cp)) / std_cs(cp); std fallback 1 if degenerate; w_i = 2 * z_i / sum_j |z_j|

rebalance.timing: close of the first Monday daily bar (UTC) of each ISO week; weights held until next rebalance
rebalance.note: spec decision per PROJECT_REVIEW_2026-06-09.md section 5B; backtest code rebalanced daily

universe.rule: live top-30 Binance spot USDT pairs by trailing 90-day dollar volume
universe.refresh: at each weekly rebalance from latest output/recorders/market-universe.ndjson snapshot

costs.borrow_note: binding flat assumption on full short notional (~1.0x of 2.0 gross); 5%/yr sensitivity reported non-binding

hedge.beta_estimation: OLS of strategy prior realized daily net returns vs BTC and EW-universe basket, trailing 90 calendar days, honest-OOS (data through rebalance close only)
hedge.gate: |beta| < 0.1 vs both BTC and EW at each quarterly look (binding)

kill_condition: at any look with >=26 forward weeks: cumulative beta-hedged net mean <= 0 AND upper 95% Newey-West CI below the 0.3-Sharpe-equivalent mean
source: scripts/edgehunt-requeue/donch_ls_final.ts lines 26 (COST=0.0004), 46-54 (channelPos), 56-57 (Cfg/Family), 64 (dir flip), 66-68 (zscore weight construction, min 6 names, gross 2.0), 96-97 (turnover cost), 144-151 (grid incl. N=120 zscore HIGH cell)
scripts/edgehunt-requeue/canon_check.ts lines 25-26 (canonical channelPos + buildZ), 36 (N=120 in canonical sweep)
output/edgehunt-requeue/SUMMARY.md PROMINENT CALLOUT (canonical pre-registered config: N=120 zscore HIGH, net Sharpe 1.405, turnover 0.385, holdout +0.79)
docs/EDGE_SEARCH_DOMAIN_CAMPAIGN.md lead 2 + audit update 2026-06-01 (borrow-adjusted OOS 0.3-0.5; honest-OOS hedge 0.78)
